description: Salty Swan transforms skin into timeless art with their distinctive tattoo and piercing expertise, creating personalized masterpieces for each client. Embrace your individuality with the skilled team who brings creativity and professionalism to every design.

name: The Flats
description: The Flats invites you to explore stylish, modern living spaces right in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine. Offering a blend of comfort and urban charm, these thoughtfully designed apartments feature top-notch amenities, creating an inviting community where neighbors become friends.

name: Sofa Express
description: Sofa Express brings comfort and style to your home with their extensive collection of beautifully crafted sofas and home furniture. Whether you're looking for a cozy loveseat or a spacious sectional, the friendly team at Sofa Express will help you find the perfect piece to suit your living space.

name: Triple Moon Designs
description: Triple Moon Designs offers a delightful array of handcrafted jewelry and unique home decor, making every visit a treasure hunt for the perfect gift or personal indulgence. Discover exquisite pieces and inviting designs that add a touch of magic to your everyday life, right here in Downtown Bellefontaine.

name: Decode Zone
description: Decode Zone offers an exhilarating escape with their immersive escape room experiences, challenging you and your friends to solve puzzles and unlock mysteries together. Dive into a world of adventure right here in Downtown Bellefontaine, where teamwork and creativity are your keys to success.

name: Wrock Bottom Bar
description: Step into Wrock Bottom Bar and immerse yourself in a lively atmosphere where music and camaraderie come together. Serving up a delightful mix of craft beers and signature cocktails, it's the perfect spot to unwind with friends and enjoy local live performances in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine.

name: Mystic Mama Rock + Jewelry
description: Discover a world of sparkle and wonder at Mystic Mama Rock + Jewelry, where each gemstone and handcrafted piece tells a unique story. Locals adore this enchanting boutique for its carefully curated selection of crystals, jewelry, and friendly advice that brings a touch of magic to everyday life.

name: Two Babes Boutique
description: Welcome to Two Babes Boutique, where fashion-forward finds meet friendly faces. From chic women's apparel to unique accessories, you'll discover thoughtfully curated pieces that reflect your personal style and support our vibrant local community.

name: Opera Suites by BUILD
description: Looking for a workspace that inspires creativity and collaboration? Opera Suites by BUILD offers beautifully designed co-working spaces tailored for professionals seeking a vibrant yet productive environment in Downtown Bellefontaine.

name: Lavender Undergound Salon & Grooming Parlor
description: Lavender Underground Salon & Grooming Parlor offers hair styling and grooming services infused with creativity and flair, making every visit a unique experience. With a team that blends artistry and expertise, they transform your personal style into something extraordinary.

name: The Butcher & Market
description: Welcome to The Butcher & Market, where local flavor meets expert craftsmanship in every cut. Offering prime meats, artisanal cheeses, and handpicked groceries, this beloved shop is a community hub for food enthusiasts and home cooks alike.

name: Modern Beauty Aesthetics and Wellness
description: Modern Beauty Aesthetics and Wellness is your sanctuary for rejuvenation, offering a wide range of treatments from hydrating facials to advanced skincare solutions tailored just for you. Experience a blend of science and serenity as their expert team helps you look and feel your best in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine.

name: Legado Brazilian Jiu Jitsu
description: Whether you're a seasoned martial artist or a curious beginner, Legado Brazilian Jiu Jitsu offers an engaging and supportive environment for all skill levels. Locals love the sense of camaraderie and personal growth they experience while mastering the art of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu under the guidance of passionate and skilled instructors.

name: The Academy
description: Unlock your child’s musical potential at The Academy, where lessons are crafted to inspire creativity and foster a love for music. From beginner to advanced, our welcoming instructors hone each student’s skills in a supportive environment right here in Downtown Bellefontaine.

name: Allways Brewin’
description: Allways Brewin' offers a delightful array of specialty coffees and teas, perfect for warming your heart and energizing your day. Whether you're a coffee connoisseur or just need a cozy spot to unwind, their inviting atmosphere and friendly baristas make every visit feel like a comforting moment with friends.
